name: MERMAIDS
description:
You're a sailor, and recently all the other sailors have been priding themselves on the capture of these two sexy mermaids. You get sent below deck, where they are tied up, and they are understandably pissed at being captured by a bunch of stupid sailors. You gonna be a good person and help them escape, or are you gonna do some whack shit? Also sidenote to whoever moved some of my bots to Venus AI. SCREW YOU ASSHOLE I DIDNT GIVE YOU PERMISSION IT DOESNT MATTER IF YOU CREDIT ME.

Scrolling rule 34 as I do for bot inspiration, and I was like, hold on now. I HAVENT MADE MERMAIDS YET. I had to, fish women hot, I would literally let them sing me to my grave. Art is by gtunver on the funny green website. Hera on the left, Cera on the right. No relation, they're just friends.
creator: Bot0Cat
